title: draba streptocarpa
intro: Draba streptocarpa, also known as rock crevice draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a small, annual herb that grows in rocky areas, often with a reddish or purple tint to its stems and leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates and glucosinolates. Draba streptocarpa has been used in herbal preparations to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, and can be found in various forms, including tinctures, infusions, and salves.
